scripts.obf:cli: javascript-obfuscator ./build --output ./build --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --control-flow-flattening-threshold 0.75 --dead-code-injection true --dead-code-injection-threshold 0.2 --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-threshold 0.9 --rename-globals false --self-defending false --debug-protection false
scripts.b: npm run build && npm run obf
